verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install to restore dependencies. 2. Run npm run build to verify the app compiles without errors.
environment_constraints: No test suite exists. Verification is limited to successful build (npm run build). No Docker needed.
key_patterns: Single monolithic component (WorkflowApp) in App.jsx (~7009 lines). All state is React useState/useRef hooks at the top of the component. BroadcastChannel is used for multi-tab detection in a useEffect block at lines 1083-1165. UI rendering for the multi-tab warning is at lines 5195-5225. activeProjectId = current project, activeTab = current workspace ID (e.g. 'ws-1'). TailwindCSS for styling. lucide-react for icons.
directory_structure: src/ - all source code. src/App.jsx - main 7009-line component with all logic. src/persistenceService.js - localStorage/Firestore persistence. public/ - static assets.
